summary: Tested Gap 1 (Thread Panel on CoachMessagesPage) and Gap 2 (Template Library in SendMessageModal). All 9 backend tests passed. All frontend UI flows verified via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: CoachPlayerProfile.js is 648 lines — consider splitting SendMessageModal into its own file for maintainability
The delete template button uses CSS opacity-0/group-hover:opacity-100 to hide until hover — this works but may be hard to discover for keyboard/accessibility users
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Test templates created and cleaned up during testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Gap 1 and Gap 2 are fully implemented and tested. Thread panel works: clicking message row opens slide-in panel with data-testid='thread-panel', shows player name, sent date, NCAA period, read status, player reply bubble, close/backdrop/view-profile buttons all functional. Template library works: 3 default templates loaded for coach, Use Template button shows dropdown, applying template populates subject+body and closes dropdown, Save As Template creates custom template, custom template shows delete button (default templates do not), delete removes the template. Backend: GET/POST/DELETE /api/coach/messages/templates all pass 100%.
